stemHtml: Assuming the CG always remains within limits, how does the CG position relate to the spin attitude of an aeroplane?

options.a: The further forward the CG, the flatter the spin attitude.
options.b: The further aft the CG, the flatter the spin attitude.
options.c: CG position does not affect the spin attitude of the aeroplane.
options.d: The closer the CG to its limits (forward or aft), the flatter the spin attitude.
